stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
After completion of the inbound turn at 2500 ft QNH, when may a further descent to 2300 ft QNH be started?

options.a: When the VOR indicator is within half full-scale deflection.
options.b: When the VOR indicator is within full-scale deflection.
options.d: When the VOR indicator is within 2.5° of the published inbound course.
